title: Shearable Vines - NeoForge
description: NeoForge version of Roundaround's Shearable Vines Mod
body:
# ✂️ Shearable Vines

Have you ever spent hours perfecting a build, only for vines to overgrow and cover up all your hard work? **Shearable Vines** is a lightweight utility mod that lets you "clip" vines to stop them in their tracks.

### 🌿 Features

* **Growth Control:** Right-click any Vine block with **Shears** to prevent it from growing further.
* **Vanilla Friendly:** Uses a custom block state property, meaning no new items or blocks are added to your game.
* **Balanced:** Clipping a vine consumes 1 durability from your shears and plays a satisfying clipping sound.
* **Aesthetic Preservation:** Keep your ruins looking "just overgrown enough" without the constant maintenance.

### 🛠️ How it Works

When you shear a vine, it sets a hidden `sheared` property to `true`. The mod then cancels the "random tick" growth logic for that specific block. It’s simple, efficient, and server-side friendly!

---

> **Note:** This is a NeoForge port of the original Fabric mod [Shearable Vines](https://modrinth.com/mod/shearable-vines) by roundaround.
